description: Style NoteThis pair references gladiator flats with slim, elegant straps from catwalk. catwalk takes the gladiator sandal trend a notch higher with this silver pair. Wear this lovely versatile pair with harem pants, denims or leggings and look perfect. This pair is designed to Fit your foot snugly without making it seem bulky. Grab them before its too late!Product DetailsForefoot and midfoot straps in silver with a separatorSmooth footbed with branding at the heelLeathery outsole with an upraised heelMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
